_about: Phase 2.2 camera-spec schema. Authored 2026-07-22 from the executable specification in tests/v2/test_media_phase22.py::TestCameraSpecSchema (the original PR #372 artifact was never committed - config/ is gitignored and the author's local copy was lost).

production.description: Production id this shot belongs to.

shot_type.description: The kind of shot; drives engine routing and gating.

duration_seconds.description: Planned duration of the shot in seconds.

storyboard_engine.description: Storyboard/keyframe generation is locked to the Kandinsky5 local engine.

motion_engine.description: Image-to-video engine. ltx is the primary; wan_vace_1_3b is experimental-only (disabled in engine roles, requires benchmark before any use).

movement.description: The single camera movement for the shot.

movement_strength.description: Normalized movement intensity; 1.0 is the hard ceiling.

framing.description: Framing note, e.g. wide, medium, close-up.

composition.description: Composition notes (subject placement, foreground/background, lighting intent).

continuity.description: Continuity anchors this shot must honor (wardrobe, time of day, screen direction).

transition.description: Transition into the next shot, e.g. cut, dissolve, match_cut.

camera_compliance.description: Whether the rendered take honored the camera spec: declared engine vs observed engine signature plus movement compliance.

shot_list.description: Ordered camera specs for every shot in the scene.

camera_movement_prohibitions.description: Movements the director prohibits for this scene (e.g. no handheld_drift in ceremony scenes).
